title: Which EVA character would you fatten up
display_title: Which EVA character would you fatten up
wikitext:
[]: Which EVA character would you fatten up? Post by Shogo-Kun » Thu Aug 11, 2011 5:31 pm And now for something completely different! So guys, if you noticed, the characters in EVA look skinny as rails. Not that I have anything wrong with it (hell, everytime I see Mari I get a boner), but some of these babies need some meat on their bones. So I ask you, my fellow geeks, which character would you "fatten up"? I'll start first! My choice would be Gendo Ikari. Yes, I know he's already a grown man, but for some reason I've always though he'd be a bit more attractive if he gained a few pounds. DISCUSS!!

[]: Post by BornIn1142 » Thu Aug 11, 2011 5:43 pm My first thought was Ritsuko, but I discarded that notion based on a chain of logic so confusing that I literally cannot put it into words. So I'll go with Hikari.

[]: Post by Shogo-Kun » Thu Aug 11, 2011 5:51 pm @Tines: Fat, BUT attractive dude!

[]: Post by Hyper Shinchan » Thu Aug 11, 2011 5:57 pm Setting apart Tines' humorism, this is a hard question since basically I would like to add a few kilos (in the right places) to basically almost every female characters (I've mentioned it sometimes in other threads), anyway if I could choice only a single one, probably I'd like to see a less ethereal Rei. The male characters are mostly fine like this, maybe Shinji is a little skinny but it's not a big concern, he's mainly lacking muscles, rather than weight. EDIT: I'm not sure if I'm understanding the question, are we talking about small "adjustments", or about turning someone into a "BBW/M"? Or are both options valid?

[]: Post by pen-pen » Thu Aug 11, 2011 7:24 pm Only one- Misato should be more curvier.The others are just fine...

[]: Post by Xard » Thu Aug 11, 2011 7:39 pm pen-pen wrote: Only one- Misato should be more curvier.The others are just fine...

[]: Post by pen-pen » Thu Aug 11, 2011 7:44 pm Xard wrote: but Misato is the curviest one as it is...

[]: Post by Azathoth » Thu Aug 11, 2011 7:45 pm Among the most lolwut threads I've seen on this subforum

[]: Post by Fireball » Thu Aug 11, 2011 8:03 pm Asuka always reminded me of this young girls that are hardly developed but already doing diets.

[]: Post by JoeD80 » Thu Aug 11, 2011 8:05 pm I think Unit 01 is looking a little skinny

[]: Post by Reichu » Thu Aug 11, 2011 9:36 pm Asuka, definitely. Oh. And Tunniel.

[]: Post by TehDonutKing » Thu Aug 11, 2011 10:04 pm Not a single character is deadly thin, so not a single one. Also, I do not find obese people to be attractive. I see obesity as a sign of poor hygiene.

[]: Post by Trajan » Thu Aug 11, 2011 10:25 pm Asuka looks like she could probably gain a couple kilos, she looks like she's recently been liberated from a concentration camp in '22 and '24.

[]: WEIGHT GAIN! B) Post by Alaska Slim » Thu Aug 11, 2011 11:22 pm Shogo-Kun wrote: @Tines: Fat, BUT attractive dude!

[]: Post by Tarnsman » Thu Aug 11, 2011 11:25 pm Rei. I like Asuka nice and petite, but Rei could use some delicious fat.

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Aug 12, 2011 1:24 am pen-pen wrote: Only one- Misato should be more curvier.The others are just fine...

[]: Post by TehDonutKing » Fri Aug 12, 2011 1:38 am Shinji only looks like that because of a QUALITY scene. Nowhere else is he that thin.

[]: Post by BornIn1142 » Fri Aug 12, 2011 3:17 am TehDonutKing wrote: Also, I do not find obese people to be attractive. I see obesity as a sign of poor hygiene.

[]: Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Aug 12, 2011 9:28 am I would give Misato and Asuka internal organs at least, though NME seems to do a slightly better job with this. In NGE it can be down-right scary sometimes. (It might have something to do with Asuka's inconsistent chest-to-navel ratio, though.) NME!Rei seems to look just fine for a girl her weight and height.
